_description: Active agent session ledger. Updated by scripts/agent/session-start.py and scripts/agent/safe-commit.py. Stale entries (no activity in >4h for foreground, >2h for background) are auto-pruned by nightly-self-heal.yml.

_fields.goal: Short description of what this session is doing
_fields.files_glob: List of glob patterns this session declares responsibility for
_fields.exclusive: If true, overlap with this session should block other sessions (not just warn)
_fields.last_activity_at: ISO8601 UTC timestamp of last commit or push
_fields.last_commit_sha: SHA of the last commit made in this session, or null
_fields.push_counter: Number of commits since last push (resets on push)
_fields.scope_widening_log: Audit trail of scope expansions [{timestamp, added_glob, reason, sha}]
